# Frontend Design Skill

This skill helps with frontend design tasks in the workspace, such as:

- refining page layout and visual hierarchy
- improving responsive styling for mobile and desktop
- polishing typography, colors, spacing, and UI details
- suggesting accessible design improvements and ARIA enhancements
- reviewing and updating component markup and CSS for better usability

## Usage

- In chat, invoke the skill with a request like `/frontend-design Improve the landing page layout`.
- Provide the component or page file name when possible, e.g. `src/app/app.component.html` or `src/styles.css`.
- Ask for design recommendations, responsive fixes, or more polished UI styling.

## Skill Notes

This skill is workspace-scoped and intended to support frontend design work for the `esemprendedor` project.
